entities.finger: a child's finger pushing the first domino
entities.dominoes: a long line of standing dominoes

scenes.title: The Domino Chain
scenes.background_prompt: A wooden table with a long row of colorful dominoes standing upright, a desk lamp, and a ruler. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A wooden table under warm lamp light. A long row of colorful wooden dominoes — red, blue, yellow, green, alternating — stand upright in a neat curving line across the entire table surface. At the far left, a child's small index finger is about to push the first domino — the fingertip just barely touching the top edge, the domino starting to lean. The next few dominoes stand close behind, ready to fall in sequence. The line curves in an S-shape across the table. A desk lamp illuminates the scene from above. A ruler and a few spare loose dominoes lie to the side. The tension is palpable — one tiny push will cascade through the entire chain.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place dominoes standing upright in a long curving S-shape line across the table. At the far left, position a child's index finger just barely touching the top edge of the first domino, the domino starting to lean.
